prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为约 13009→14136→10323→15966→16042，整体呈波动后移趋势。2023 年出现 10323 的异常前移（可能与当年省控线下降及大小年效应有关），2024–2025 年连续两年稳定在 15966–16042 区间，2025 年基准约 16042 名；该校在吉林省物理类（含理科）招生计划：2021 年 100 人→2022 年 104 人→2023 年 104 人→2024 年 106 人→2025 年 99 人；2026 年计划 96 人，较 2025 年缩招 3 人，缩招约 3%，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南昌大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第 69–78 名区间，2026 年主榜第 74 名，属中上水平综合类大学；2026 年声誉评价偏正面，主要因南昌大学男排在大学生排球联赛中夺冠，体育声誉显著提升；抖音热度排名第 43（较热），短视频曝光以校园环境和排球夺冠为主，报考关注度有所升温；2023 年曾出现投档线异常信号但影响已消退；食品科学与工程为 A+ 学科（全国顶尖），材料科学与工程为双一流建设学科；临床医学、麻醉学等医学类专业为国家级一流本科专业建设点，对中高分段考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，南昌大学在上述专业均有招生且位次靠前；吉林省 2026 年高考总人数约 110868 人，较 2025 年（历史类+物理类合计约 111492 人）略有减少，竞争略趋缓和；南昌大学位于江西省南昌市，属中部地区综合性大学，对吉林省考生而言属跨省报考；该校在吉林省招生规模适中（物理类约 96–106 人），无显著地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2024–2025 年位次稳定在 16000 名附近、2026 年小幅缩招（竞争略缓解）、学校声誉偏正面及抖音热度较热（吸引更多考生关注）等因素，在 ，考虑声誉提升带来的竞争加剧效应，预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 15780 名，区间 15280–16280 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 13009→14136→10323→15966→16042, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2023, there was an abnormal forward shift to 10323 (possibly due to a decrease in the provincial control line and the size-year effect). In 2024–2025, it stabilized in the 15966–16042 range for two consecutive years, with a baseline of about 16042 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province for Physics Category (including Science) was: 100 in 2021→104 in 2022→104 in 2023→106 in 2024→99 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 96, a reduction of 3 from 2025, about 3% decrease, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable in the 69–78 range in recent years, ranking 74th in the 2026 main list, making it an upper-middle-level comprehensive university. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is relatively positive, mainly due to the men's volleyball team of Nanchang University winning the college volleyball league, significantly enhancing its sports reputation. Its Douyin popularity ranks 43rd (relatively hot), with short video exposure focusing on campus environment and volleyball championship, increasing application attention. In 2023, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line, but its impact has subsided. Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (top in the country), and Materials Science and Engineering is a Double First-Class construction discipline. Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Anesthesiology are national first-class undergraduate program construction points, strongly attracting middle-to-high score candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are consistently highly recommended in society. Nanchang University offers these majors and has higher rankings. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Jilin Province is about 110,868, slightly decreasing from 2025 (History Category + Physics Category total about 111,492), slightly easing competition. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, a comprehensive university in the central region, and is a cross-provincial application for Jilin candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Jilin Province is moderate (about 96–106 for Physics Category), with no significant regional preference signal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking around 16000 in 2024–2025, a slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (slightly easing competition), a positive reputation, and relatively hot Douyin popularity (attracting more candidate attention), and taking into account the intensified competition due to reputation improvement, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 15780, with a range of 15280–16280.

It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 15000 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine, Computer Science and Technology, and Electrical Engineering and Automation; candidates with rankings between 15500–16000 should mainly choose Tier 2 majors like Software Engineering, Automation, and Food Science and Engineering (A+ discipline); candidates with rankings after 16000 can consider Tier 3 majors such as Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Nursing as safety options. Note that Nursing has height requirements (male 167cm, female 157cm or above), so candidates should confirm their own conditions when applying.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1946 → 1869 → 3367 → 2640 → 2418, showing a fluctuating trend. The abnormal shift to 3367 in 2023 (possibly due to a significant drop in the provincial control line that year) stabilized to the 2640–2418 range in 2024–2025, with a baseline of about 2418 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category (including Liberal Arts) in Jilin Province: 28 in 2021 → 24 in 2022 → 24 in 2023 → 22 in 2024 → 23 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 22, a reduction of 1 compared to 2025, a decrease of about 4.3%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 69–78 range in recent years, ranking 74th in the main list in 2026, placing it in the upper-middle tier of comprehensive universities. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is generally positive, mainly due to the men's volleyball team winning the championship, enhancing its sports reputation; its Douyin popularity ranking is 43rd (relatively hot), indicating increased attention from applicants. In 2022, there was neutral public opinion due to the Li Jiaqi academic qualification controversy, but the impact has faded. Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline; Law, Economics, History, English, etc., are national first-class undergraduate program construction points, attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially recommended. The total number of Jilin Province Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 110,868, with History Category candidates showing a slight downward trend in recent years (31,071 in 2025 vs. 32,343 in 2024), making competition slightly less intense. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, representing a cross-province application. The university's enrollment scale for History Category in Jilin Province is relatively small (about 22–28 people), with no significant regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking range of 2400–2640 in 2024–2025, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (slightly easing competition), and the generally positive reputation, and taking into account the slight decrease in the total number of History Category candidates making competition less intense, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 2340, with a range of 1840–2840.
